violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution sanitizer buckets was observed to test below 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. New sanitizer mix was added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
